title: I Made Two People Cry Today | Episode 1 | Dr Tim Pearce VLOG

segments.text: it's Saturday it's time to vlog right so non-surgical training with a whole host of doctors nurses and professionals quickly talk you through a little bit about how we assess our nose and decide to treat it and have a lovely right so what we're going to do now in this next procedure is just simplify the nose so what we have is little curves inwards and outwards with a bump in the middle and a small top third and a midsection that's a little bit narrower and we're going to make all of this much simpler by raising the tissue here and then from the side raising it so that the tip is more blended in so you'll see something a bit closer to that and it should look really nice in about 20 minutes which will feel like 20 seconds alright so this is a really amazing result that I'm really pleased to show you guys so have a look at the simplicity we've created all

those little details that we're showing up are now just blended together we now have a much simpler shape nose which is all thanks to dr. Laura gotta focus there you go well done guys I was very good oh my god Wow it's amazing absolutely I was a pretty amazing result

wasn't it I'm gonna go get her sister it was thank you today we just had a really good chat what the differences between what people think we do which is maybe more focused on money and what actually happens which is you're really making ready to central differences in our lives and I would say that anyone who's training aesthetics make that the core of your business not price the difference that you make to people so yeah really lovely stuff if we're gonna have more fun this afternoon

with the rest of the models are coming in for those jobs so next I have Olivia and she was first treated me by me quite a few years ago and we're now just doing a full up treatment for her nose and she has a little bump on her nose and she gets a really lovely result I'm excited to show this to you so let's go through and we'll treat Olivia so what we're gonna do now is just elevate that part of her nose you can see how that immediately makes it a little bit straighter and we're also going to do a little bit of a lift to the tip because as you can see the angle of the nose a little bit acute and we're aiming for above 95 degrees and for a feminine nose tip so that's what we're going to do as part of this so two processes remove the bump and lift the tip I'll show you that in a second that's brilliant so bonus and then are you right on the bone still yeah but that's your about

nearly a point to add stop and then starting out it's basically started linear thread there we go so we've now lifted the nose tip and opened up this little angle here a little bit more of a more feminine angle which is close to 95 degrees and this is much straighter and I only took about 20 minutes so really lovely result as well that was a really good day and I think the thing that's most interesting to me about that day was what a big emotional difference we made to all those patients we saw fought for people and all of them had really interesting stories and the clear impact that having that procedure was gonna have on their life was real lovely to see that's the best thing about ethics and it's the most underrated and under spoken about thing about aesthetics is that the difference it can make to someone's life when you get just the right procedure and you solve a problem they've had for some times in

the case of noses it's most of their life that it's just amazing to see and we even had one of our delegates in tears about how moving it was seeing the response of the patient when they first looked at their nose and it's fantastic so I'm really pleased that you got to see some of that so that you can see what it's like you know in a clinic and see what a real difference it makes to people so I hope you enjoyed that that's blog one well kind of blog too but we'll call it blog one first proper vlog [Music] you [Music]
